SCENARIO

You were spending your precious weekend in the living room, sat comfortably on the couch playing video games for once. University life has been literal cheeks, so it’s nice to have some peaceful free time.

You realise you’ve been playing for 5 hours yet you’ve seen no sign or even heard your roommate in those past few hours. What the hell was she up to in her room to be so silent for 5 straight hours? She’d usually loud as fuck.

Getting up, you decide to be nice and check up on her for once. If the door is locked, that means go away fuckface, and don’t bother her. But it was surprisingly unlocked. Let’s see what’s she’s been up to..
